tooltip: Financial protection mechanism that safeguards clients deposited funds by compensating them up to a specified limit institution becomes insolvent

tooltip: Risk management feature that ensures a trader cannot lose more money than he has deposited, preventing his account balance from falling below zero

name: Segregated Accounts
tooltip: Client funds being held separately from the brokers own operational funds, ensuring that clients money is protected and not used for the brokers business activities
